center.name: Arctic Cordillera
center.summary: Arctic Cordillera是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红腹滨鹬，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red knot or just knot (Calidris canutus) is a medium-sized shorebird which breeds in tundra and the Arctic Cordillera in the far north of Canada, Europe, and Russia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The red knot or just knot (Calidris canutus) is a medium-sized shorebird which breeds in tundra and the Arctic Cordillera in the far north of Canada, Europe, and Russia
